headline: JPMorganChase to Present at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference
summary: NEW YORK, May 20, 2026--Marianne Lake, CEO of Consumer & Community Banking, will present at the Morgan Stanley U.S. Financials Conference in New York City on Tuesday, June 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. (Eastern).

headline: JPMorgan sees biotech sector at inflection point, resumes coverage on 14 Firms
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan has reinstated ratings and price targets on 14 large-cap biotechnology companies, describing the sector as being at a critical “inflection point” as pipeline successes increasingly translate into profitable commercial franchises.

headline: How The Hochschild Mining (LSE:HOC) Story Is Shifting As Fair Value Targets Reset
summary: Hochschild Mining’s consolidated fair value price target has been trimmed slightly from £8.07 to £8.04 per share, pointing to only a very small reset in the modelling work. That shift sits against a backdrop of earlier JPMorgan target moves from £6.90 to £8.90 and then to £9.90, along with more recent cuts of £0.40 and £1.10, which together reflect a mix of optimism and caution in current research. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets shape the evolving narrative around the...
